positive: A whimsical and elegant stylized illustration featuring intertwining tropical bioluminescent flora and silhouettes of stylized woodland fauna (e.g., fox, deer, moth). The composition should be centrally arranged and highly symmetrical, filling the frame with intricate details. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets minimalist linework. Use deep forest greens, oceanic blues, royal purples, and accents of glowing golden yellow for contrast. The aesthetic must be suitable for a clean, high-contrast apparel print, utilizing strong negative space and clear, defined silhouettes. High detail, perfect symmetry, vector graphic quality, golden ratio composition, flat lay view.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, poorly drawn, blurry, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, grayscale, photorealistic, 3D render, bad composition
